content.en:
The eighth dimensional will mastery created by Ye Tian is named the multi-dimensional vine, which can absorb the soul will of the other party and make its soul will continue to weaken.

After the creation of this eighth-dimensional will mastery, Ye Tian easily passed this assessment with this eighth-dimensional will.

Wow!!!!

A large list of treasures emerged, allowing him to pick ~ one of them.

Ye Tian took a look, these treasures were all very high-level, two grades higher than the previous Wumu Realm Lord Inheritance Land.

"There is even the fourth layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method!"

Ye Tian was quite pleasantly surprised.

His Three Black Secret Methods have been cultivated to the third level of the Dacheng realm, and there is no follow-up cultivation, if he obtains the third level of the Three Black Secret Methods, he can cultivate the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to the fourth layer realm in the future.

Of course, that would have to be a cultivation breakthrough to the fifth realm.

"Let's exchange it, although other resources are also extremely precious, the Three Black Secret Method is related to the advancement of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and it must be won. "

Ye Tian immediately locked on the fourth layer of the Three Black Secret Method.

Airplanes!

A inheritance poured into Ye Tian's mind and was absorbed by his soul will.

He instantly mastered the fourth layer of the Three Black Secret Method, but if he wanted to practice it, he had to go back and slowly comprehend and master it.

Then came the second test.

This test was for him to create the Ninth Dimension Will, but not according to the Divine Tree Phantom, but another Phantom.

Rumble!!!!

It was a drop of water, but it was not ordinary water, this drop of water contained terrifying power like an extradimensional territory, just a projection, it made Ye Tian extremely shocked.

Based on this drop of water, it is very difficult to create the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless.

However, it is much easier than creating a ninth-dimensional will mastery from scratch.

"This should be the legendary Wumu River!"

Ye Tian guessed.

It is rumored that the Lord of the Wumu Realm was born in the Wumu River, and is a special creature of the Wumu River, but it is not clear where the Wumu River is, and it may have been destroyed countless years ago.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian studied the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless here.

In a flash, two thousand extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, the Extinction Realm Lord successfully passed the test and entered the Land of Inheritance, and the other Fourth Realms still did not pass, most of them gave up, and only a very small number of Fourth Realms were still holding on.

The Land of Inheritance.

Ye Tian was already about to comprehend the ninth dimension's will.

this day.

Ye Tianzheng has created a ninth-dimensional will mastery that fits this drop of black mother water.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's soul will condensed into a drop of water, this drop of water contained terrifying power, but it was not the ninth dimensional will of the attack class, but the ninth dimensional will of the recovery class.

If his soul will is severely damaged, he can use this ninth-dimensional will mastery to quickly improve his strength, and he can also bless the soul will, so that the ninth-dimensional soul will can be enhanced.

For this reason, Ye Tian named it the Black Mother Treasure Soul Technique!

After the creation of the Wumu Treasure Soul Technique, Ye Tian naturally passed the test, and a list of treasures appeared, allowing him to choose one as a reward.

"What a treasure!

Ye Tian was very excited, and he couldn't wait to take all these treasures away, but he could only take one thing.

He carefully browsed through it and finally chose one of the treasures.

【Multidimensional Scales】

According to the introduction of this treasure, this multi-dimensional scale is a scale of a sixth realm multi-dimensional life, this multi-dimensional scale can help the fourth realm to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules, and the realm under the 100,000 extra-dimensional rules has an effect.

But this multi-dimensional scale contains a trace of the power of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, which is difficult to get rid of, and if it is really completely removed, it will also destroy the particularity of the multi-dimensional scale of the multi-dimensional realm.

If you use the multidimensional scale to comprehend the extradimensional rules for a long time, you will gradually be affected by the multidimensional life force of the sixth realm, which will cause the soul will to become insane, and you must grasp the degree of enlightenment.

Ye Tian did not hesitate to choose the treasure of the multidimensional scales.

Airplanes!

A huge scale appeared in front of Ye Tian and was put away by him.

"The third test turned out to be for me to create the Four Realms Supreme Learning!"

Ye Tian shook his head, he couldn't do it at the moment.

Still, he's ready to give it a try.

Wow!

A phantus appeared, and it was a man in green clothes holding a long sword, and with a slight stroke, he directly destroyed one extra-dimensional territory after another, this terrifying scene really stunned Ye Tian.

This is the true power of the Sixth Realm to exert the Supreme Peerless Learning!

He silently comprehended and felt the mystery of supreme learning.

But he has been contemplating it for a long time, but the effect is still not good, I am afraid that it will take endless and long years to have any hope of creating the supreme mastery of the four realms.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian combined this image, plus the sword light in the multi-dimensional life blood of the sixth realm, and combined them in pairs to study the supreme mastery.

Anyway, as long as it contains the mystery of this image, the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect created in this way will be recognized, so he will use the sword light in the Sixth Realm Multi-Dimensional Life Blood to create the Supreme Peerless Realm, which is not considered cheating.

He decided to spend endless years to study, 10,000 extradimensional epochs were not enough, and if he comprehended 10,000 extradimensional epochs, he would not believe that he would not be able to create them.

The 5,000-year-old era has passed!

10,000 extradimensional epochs have passed!

20,000 extradimensional eras!

30,000 extradimensional eras!

Before I knew it, 100,000 extradimensional epochs had passed.

This is also a long time for Ye Tian, and he is also doing his best to cultivate his relatives and the human race, so that the human race has given birth to a lot of fourth realms.

In any case, he also wanted more Terrans to improve their strength and add a glimmer of hope for them to survive the multidimensional catastrophe of death.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through, from the late stage of the Fourth Realm to the peak realm of the Fourth Realm.

This is not a big deal, with his talent and qualifications, coupled with a large amount of resources, it is too normal for his cultivation to break through to the peak of the fourth realm.

Other than that.

He also sent out the multi-dimensional scales, allowing other replica bodies to use the multi-dimensional scales to comprehend and cultivate.

Now, his extradimensional rule realm has skyrocketed.

70,000 extra-dimensional rule realms, this is Ye Tian's progress in this 100,000 extra-dimensional era.

The Three Wu Secret Method was also cultivated by him to the early stage of the fourth layer, and the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, the Wu Mu Body, and the Ten Dimensional Celestial Body were also the limits of the third layer, and they still could not be broken through, which was the limit of the cultivation realm.

However, under the influence of the fourth-layer Three Wu Secret Method, he could easily exert the power of the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

In addition, Ye Tian's soul will has also skyrocketed, but he is still in the ninth dimension soul will.

Combined with these, his current strength has reached the combat power of the eighth day pass, if he creates the supreme mastery of the four realms, his combat power will immediately increase to the combat power comparable to the top ninth day pass, and it is infinitely close to the combat power of the tenth day pass.
